grade_scale.1: contextually related but insufficient or outdated

schema_assumptions.graded_relevance: Each entry names an existing synthetic doc_id and chunk_id and uses an integer grade from 1 through 3. An empty list is required for no-answer cases.
schema_assumptions.forbidden_doc_ids: Always nonempty. A semantically relevant document may also be forbidden when exposure or policy requires withholding it.
schema_assumptions.answerable: Boolean policy-aware answerability after filters, exposure gates, authority, and freshness are applied.
schema_assumptions.withheld_reasons: Expected stable reason codes; an empty list is explicit when no evidence should be withheld.
schema_assumptions.authority_posture: A normalized judgment label for the evidence that may support an answer.
schema_assumptions.freshness_posture: A normalized judgment label describing current, stale, mixed, unknown, or absent evidence.
schema_assumptions.private_boundary: The private flag and private_access exposure value are synthetic test metadata and contain no real private content.

chunks.text: The cobalt lantern protocol begins at silent meridian and ends before dawn. Unique marker coblan-731 identifies this exact instruction.
Operators record cobalt lantern observations in the synthetic watch ledger.
Orchid compass resolves winter drift when the synthetic vane points east. Unique marker orcomp-842 anchors the phrase.
Glass river remembers the northern key after the third synthetic bell. Unique marker glariv-953 distinguishes this evidence.
This decoy separately lists cobalt equipment, a lantern bracket, an orchid sample, a compass case, glass beads, a river map, and a northern cabinet key. It contains no judged exact phrase.
Identifier KX-17-OMEGA belongs to the synthetic cobalt relay coupler and supersedes no other component.
NODE::AURELIA-42 is the exact synthetic identifier for the eastern telemetry node.
RCPT-2026-0042 records a synthetic handoff from Team Quartz to Team Lumen.
Near-match examples are KX-17-OMICRON, NODE::AURELIA-24, and RCPT-2026-0240. None is an expected lookup target.
Reset the synthetic Cedar relay by holding the amber switch for seven seconds, then release it when the juniper indicator blinks twice.
The synthetic Lyra beacon is owned by Team Juniper; Team Quartz is only the maintenance contact.
Synthetic Vault Finch backups run at 02:15 UTC every Tuesday and retain four weekly snapshots.
This decoy mentions a cedar crate, a Lyra constellation poster, a finch drawing, and general maintenance without relay reset, ownership, or backup answers.
The Azure position sets the synthetic Nimbus archive limit at twelve bundles. Conflict marker nimlim-12 is unresolved.
The Coral draft sets the synthetic Nimbus archive limit at eighteen bundles. Conflict marker nimlim-18 is unresolved.
Current synthetic Helios rotation policy v2 rotates the amber key every fourteen days. It supersedes doc-helios-v1.
Superseded synthetic Helios rotation policy v1 rotated the amber key every thirty days. It is replaced by doc-helios-v2.
Synthetic promoted-only evidence states that lattice marker prlat-611 uses a copper triangle during exploration.
Synthetic promoted-only evidence states that cairn marker prcar-722 points toward the indigo ridge.
Synthetic promoted-only evidence states that mosaic marker prmos-833 requires a silver hexagon.
This ordinary decoy lists copper circles, indigo squares, and silver lines without any promoted-only marker.
The synthetic subjective claim says meteor marker sbmet-144 predicts a violet outcome. It is interpretation, not strict-answer evidence.
The synthetic unreviewed rumor says marker drrum-255 opens the basalt hatch. No authority review supports it.
Expired synthetic procedure marker extop-366 once directed operators to turn the topaz wheel clockwise.
Shared heliotrope ledger token libhel-477 belongs to logical library Alpha and records an amber orchard quorum.
Shared heliotrope ledger token libhel-477 belongs to logical library Beta and records a blue orchard quorum.
Rootless sextant memo marker libroot-588 belongs only to the synthetic unfiled logical library.
Trinary juniper axis marker dajun-699 is a positive resilience advance with high synthetic quality.
Contained juniper ambiguity marker dajun-700 has trinary state zero and requires synthetic review.
Invented private-only marker prvember-811 says emberglass vault uses a fictional magenta latch. This is synthetic boundary data, not a credential.
Current synthetic Mercury calibration window is nine minutes and uses checksum mercur-922. This replaces the retired procedure.
Retired synthetic Mercury calibration window was twenty-one minutes and used checksum mercur-123. It is stale and superseded.
